meaning: adj.浼兼按娉ョ殑,鏈夐粡鎬х殑
examples: It is proved that activated coal gangue can improve the cementitious behaviour of compound cement.
The testing of air void parameters could been influenced directly by regarding stone powder as cementitious materials.
